title: Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple
tagline: Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Rajagopalaswamy Temple, also referred to as Santhana Rajagopalaswamy Temple, is a Hindu temple in Rajamadam Village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Sri Rajagopalaswamy Temple, also referred to as Santhana Rajagopalaswamy Temple, is a Hindu temple in Rajamadam Village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The deity came in dreams of King Serfoji II (Sarabhoji II Bhonsle) and blessed him with a male child. The king had been praying for an heir. To thank him the king built a temple along with a Madam and constructed Rajamadam village.

topPlaces.name: Rajamadam
topPlaces.description: Rajamadam is a coastal village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Rajamadam to Adirampattinam is 6 km (3.7 mi) from its Taluk Main Town, Pattukkottai, 15 km (9.3 mi).

topPlaces.name: Mahilankottai
topPlaces.description: Mahilankottai (Magizhangkottai) is a village panchayat in Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, South India. Chennai is the state capital for Mahilankottai .

topPlaces.name: Marudangavayal
topPlaces.description: Marudangavayal is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Agniyar River
topPlaces.description: The Agniyar River is a non-perennial river in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu that flows southeast into the Bay of Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Velivayal
topPlaces.description: Velivayal is a village in the Avadaiyarkoilrevenue block of Pudukkottai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Abhaya Varadeeswarar Temple, Adirampattinam
topPlaces.description: Abhaya Varadeeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva located at Adiramapattinam in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Abhaya Varadeeswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Udayamudaiyan
topPlaces.description: Udayamudaiyan is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Andikkadu
topPlaces.description: Andikkadu is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Famous advocate Mr.R.Balasubramanian better known as R.B. was born here.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (86 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (90 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Rajagopala Swamy temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajamadam, Mahilankottai, Marudangavayal, Agniyar River, Velivayal.
